message:
fix(net,io_driver): close reactor wake race and stale interest accumulation

Remove the racy is_polling guard from IoRegistration and wake the reactor
unconditionally on register/rearm, preventing missed wakeups when a poller
enters its blocking wait concurrently (critical for io_uring). Add a
post-register accept() retry in TcpListener::poll_accept to catch
connections that land during the registration window. Replace the sticky
interest OR in both TcpStream and split-stream rearm paths with the
caller's live interest set, preventing stale WRITABLE bits from persisting
across read waits.

All three fixes include targeted regression tests with mock reactors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
